heading: Remove Users or Teams from a Project
body:
**Atlascli:**

Atlas CLI

To delete a user from a project using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas projects users delete <ID> [options]

```

To remove a team from the project you specify using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas projects teams delete <teamId> [options]

```

To learn more about the syntax and parameters for the previous commands, see the Atlas CLI documentation for
[atlas projects users delete](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-projects-users-delete) and
[atlas projects teams delete](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-projects-teams-delete).

Related Links

- [Install the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/install-atlas-cli)

- [Connect to the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/connect-atlas-cli)

**Ui:**

Atlas UI

To remove a user or team from a project using the Atlas UI:

Click  to the right of the Atlas user or
team you want to remove.

- To confirm an Atlas user removal, click
  Remove User.

- To confirm a team removal, click
  Delete Team.

- To keep the Atlas user or team in the project, click
  Cancel.
